Stationery.text: Hi {{name}}, checking in from Rangoons! We have new stationery stock in Rawalpindi. Would you like to see the catalog?
Salaam {{name}}! Rangoons here — fresh stationery arrivals today. Want prices + photos?

Socks.text: Hi {{name}}, Soufia here from Rangoons! Our new sock collection is in. Want me to send photos?
Hello {{name}} 👋 Rangoons update: new socks drop just landed. Should I share designs + rates?
